title: AI Shocks Again: Google Post-AGI , New Claude, Microsoft 7 AI, 92% Human Robot, Fable 5 Backlash
summary: This video covers multiple recent AI developments including Google's post-AGI research directions, Claude's evolving capabilities, Microsoft's release of seven new AI models, China's MOYA humanoid robot achieving 92% human-like characteristics, and Anthropic's Fable 5 model which faced significant backlash from the community.
writeup: The video rounds up several recent AI developments: Google's stated research directions for a post-AGI phase, ongoing changes to Claude's capabilities, and Microsoft's release of seven new AI models. It also covers China's MOYA humanoid robot, described as reaching 92% human-like characteristics, and Anthropic's Fable 5 model, which drew significant community backlash. The format is a news survey, so each item is a brief update rather than a deep dive, spanning frontier lab roadmaps, robotics, and model releases.
